name: extract_claimant_statement_features
description: Extract structured features from claimant's written or recorded statement for credibility assessment and fact validation

incident_description.description: Claimant's description of how incident occurred (summary)

incident_date_claimed.description: Date of incident as stated by claimant (YYYY-MM-DD format)

incident_time_claimed.description: Time of incident as stated by claimant

narrative_consistency.description: Whether narrative is consistent with prior documents and within itself

detail_level.description: Level of detail and specificity provided in statement

emotional_appropriateness.description: Whether emotional response matches injury severity: appropriate (normal), excessive (overreaction), insufficient (underreaction)

timeline_accuracy.description: Whether timeline of events is accurate and internally consistent

story_consistency_score.description: Overall consistency of story across different parts of statement

exaggeration_indicators.description: Evidence of symptom or injury exaggeration: none (realistic), minor (slight embellishment), moderate (notable exaggeration), significant (clear exaggeration)

coaching_evidence.description: Evidence that claimant was coached or prepared: none (natural statement), possible (some indicators), likely (clear coaching detected)

malingering_risk.description: Risk of malingering or fabricating/exaggerating symptoms

fact_verification.description: Assessment of how stated facts compare to other documents (e.g., 'facts match prior documents', 'contradicts medical records', 'no other sources to verify')

discrepancy_identification.description: Description of major discrepancies found (e.g., 'no major discrepancies', 'timeline conflicts with employer report', 'injury description differs from ER notes')

missing_information_gaps.description: Key information gaps or missing details (e.g., 'minor gaps in timeline', 'no mention of prior injuries', 'witness accounts not provided')

claimant_motivation_level.description: Claimant's expressed motivation to recover and return to work

financial_pressure_indicators.description: Indicators of financial pressure that might influence claim behavior

support_system_strength.description: Strength of claimant's support system (family, friends, resources)

recovery_attitude.description: Claimant's attitude toward recovery: positive (optimistic, engaged), neutral (passive), negative (pessimistic, resistant)

functional_limitations_claimed.description: Activities claimant states they cannot perform

prior_medical_history_disclosed.description: Whether claimant disclosed relevant prior medical history

prior_injuries_same_area.description: Whether claimant reports prior injuries to same body area

witness_names.description: Names of witnesses mentioned by claimant

witness_count.description: Number of witnesses to incident mentioned by claimant

employer_notification_timing.description: When claimant states they notified employer (e.g., 'immediately', 'next day', '3 days later')

safety_equipment_claimed.description: Claimant's statement about safety equipment usage

training_status_claimed.description: Claimant's statement about training received for the task

inconsistencies_noted.description: Specific inconsistencies identified within statement or compared to other documents

red_flags.description: Red flags identified in statement (e.g., exaggerated symptoms, contradictory timeline, delayed reporting without explanation)

corroborating_elements.description: Elements of statement that can be independently verified or corroborated

narrative_analysis.description: Rich text analysis (500-1000 characters) covering: (1) Summary of claimant's account and key facts stated, (2) Credibility assessment with supporting factors (consistency, detail, emotional appropriateness), (3) Identified inconsistencies, red flags, or fraud indicators, (4) Comparison with other available evidence and validation results, (5) Impact on claim handling strategy and recommended follow-up

overall_confidence.description: Confidence in credibility assessment and extracted facts from claimant statement

missing_information.description: Important information not addressed in claimant's statement
